_comment: Recipes to append into ~/.claude_runner/recipes.json. These are the Agent Hands-automatable steps of the iOS + Android store publish flow. Steps marked 'human' must be executed manually and are mirrored in Daemon_Manual_Tasks_Log.docx.

cap_install.description: Install Capacitor deps into the make-a-song project (safe to re-run)

cap_add_ios.description: Generate the iOS Xcode project under ios/
cap_add_ios.cmd: npx cap add ios && npx cap sync ios

cap_add_android.description: Generate the Android Studio project under android/
cap_add_android.cmd: npx cap add android && npx cap sync android

cap_sync.description: Re-sync web assets + Capacitor config into native projects (run after any capacitor.config.ts edit)

generate_native_icons.description: Blast the app icon + splash across every iOS/Android size

generate_screenshots.description: Run the Playwright screenshot generator against the live site
generate_screenshots.cmd: npm install --save-dev playwright && npx playwright install chromium && node app-store/screenshots/generate.mjs

fill_team_id_in_aasa.description: Replace __TEAMID__ in apple-app-site-association with the real Apple Team ID, commit, redeploy

fill_sha_in_assetlinks.description: Replace __SHA256_PLACEHOLDER__ in assetlinks.json with the release keystore fingerprint, commit, redeploy

android_build_release_aab.description: Build a signed release AAB for Play Store upload

_not_yet_automatable.description: These are the things Daemon v2 needs to learn. Mirrored in Daemon_Manual_Tasks_Log.docx.
items: Apple Developer Program enrollment (2FA, D-U-N-S, payment)
Google Play Console account creation (ID verification)
Bundle ID registration in Apple Developer portal
App Store Connect listing creation + filling in every field
Play Console listing creation + Data Safety form
Play Console closed test with 12+ testers for 14 days
App Review submission + responding to reviewer messages
Apple Team ID copy from developer.apple.com/account
Privacy policy + support page content authoring
